pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Save the document as GalaDinnerMenu.docx in the Documents folder'
Task description explicitly specifies saving to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\
6 inches * 1440 twips/inch = 8640 twips. Task requires right-aligned tab stop with dot leaders at 6-inch mark.
verifier.py line 33 defines TAB_TOLERANCE = 1440 (±1 inch). Metadata claims 720 twips (±0.5 inches).
All 10 items appear verbatim in task description under Appetizers, Entrées, and Desserts sections
All prices match those in task description: Scallops $18, Bisque $14, Tartare $16, Filet Mignon $45, Salmon $38, Chicken $34, Risotto $28, Fondant $15, Tarte Tatin $14, Cheeses $18

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a formally formatted multi-course dinner menu in Microsoft Word with the title 'Annual Corporate Gala Dinner' (Centered, Bold, 20pt) and three sections for Appetizers, Entrées, and Desserts. The critical requirement is using a Right-Aligned Tab Stop with Dot Leaders at the 6-inch mark (8640 twips) to align prices. The document contains 10 menu items with realistic fine-dining prices ranging from $14-$45, all of which are verified against the task description. The file must be saved as 'GalaDinnerMenu.docx' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. One discrepancy exists: the metadata claims a tolerance of 720 twips (±0.5 inches) for the tab position, but the verifier implementation uses 1440 twips (±1 inch).
